variables.notes: OK. The statement shows a distinct D&A line separate from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows, so it appears not embedded in 'Personnel Expenses' or 'Other operating expenses'. However, because the D&A line is not functionally split between COGS and overhead, some portion could relate to non-SG&A operating activity. Manual review is warranted, but the conservative single-row choice is the summary 'Depreciation expenses' rather than its components.
